---
title: "Lady Audrey Jane Charlotte Buller"
---

## Lady Audrey Jane Charlotte Buller

**Dates:** (d.1926)

**Maiden name:** (Townshend)

### Description

wife of General Sir Redvers Buller (1839-1908), commander in chief during the Boer War.

### Letters

- Letter from March 27 [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
